languages.text: "Методы Эоганна выглядят эффективными. Отправьте бойцов, умеющих обращаться с электродуговым оружием, на патрулирование".
"Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."
languages.original_text: "Методы Эоганна выглядят эффективными. Отправьте бойцов, умеющих обращаться с электродуговым оружием, на патрулирование".

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn's methods appear effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc-weaponry to conduct patrols."
"Eogunn's methods appear effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc-weaponry to conduct patrols."
"Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."
"Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

languages.text: "Eogunns Methoden klingen effektiv. Lasst mit Lichtbogen-Waffen geschulte Soldaten patrouillieren."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunns Methoden klingen effektiv. Lasst mit Lichtbogen-Waffen geschulte Soldaten patrouillieren."

languages.text: « Les méthodes d'Eogunn paraissent efficaces. Envoyez en patrouille des soldats dûment formés à l'utilisation des armes électriques. »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

traits.locale_text: « Les méthodes d'Eogunn paraissent efficaces. Envoyez en patrouille des soldats dûment formés à l'utilisation des armes électriques. »

languages.text: «Los métodos de Eogunn parecen efectivos. Envíe soldados entrenados en el uso de armas voltaicas a realizar las patrullas».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

traits.locale_text: «Los métodos de Eogunn parecen efectivos. Envíe soldados entrenados en el uso de armas voltaicas a realizar las patrullas».

languages.text: "Eogunn'un yöntemleri etkili görünüyor. Devriye gezmeleri için volt atım silahlarının kullanımı konusunda eğitim almış askerleri gönder."
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn'un yöntemleri etkili görünüyor. Devriye gezmeleri için volt atım silahlarının kullanımı konusunda eğitim almış askerleri gönder."

languages.text: “伊奥贡的方法听起来行之有效。派遣熟练使用电弧武器的士兵执行巡逻任务。”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn's methods sound effective. Dispatch soldiers trained in the use of arc weapons to conduct patrols."

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡的方法听起来行之有效。派遣熟练使用电弧武器的士兵执行巡逻任务。”
